response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Inferred the song as 'Hinotori', Takanashi Kiara's first original song, based on audio phonetics matching Japanese and English lyrics perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: No reference lyrics were provided in the Reference JSON, so 100% manual transcription and translation were applied. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were meticulously timed to match the vocal bursts and fast-paced nature of the live performance, maintaining high semantic accuracy.

subtitles.original: Kikiriki! Welcome to Day 1 of Drawn to Dawn!
subtitles.english: Kikiriki! Welcome to Day 1 of Drawn to Dawn!

subtitles.original: I am Takanashi Kiara. Let's kick it off!
subtitles.english: I am Takanashi Kiara. Let's kick it off!

subtitles.original: 瞬く 星の降り立つ
subtitles.english: The twinkling stars landing...

subtitles.original: 欠けたステップを繋ぎ合わせた
subtitles.english: ...piecing together the chipped steps...

subtitles.original: メモリー
subtitles.english: ...into a memory.

subtitles.original: 聖なる従者が集う
subtitles.english: Where the holy servants gather,

subtitles.original: 神話の理
subtitles.english: the principles of myth,

subtitles.original: 祈りに耳を澄ませ
subtitles.english: listen closely to the prayers.

subtitles.original: Tell me, I can hear it clearly
subtitles.english: Tell me, I can hear it clearly

subtitles.original: Tell me, 声なき声に
subtitles.english: Tell me, to the voiceless voice,

subtitles.original: あらがう言葉
subtitles.english: the words that resist,

subtitles.original: 導く鼓動が呼ぶ
subtitles.english: the guiding heartbeat calls.

subtitles.original: ほむら降り注ぐ空に 身を焦がして
subtitles.english: Burning my body in the sky where flames pour down,

subtitles.original: 乱れた空が描いた イミテーション
subtitles.english: an imitation drawn by the chaotic sky.

subtitles.original: 数多重なる試練も生き抜いてみせる
subtitles.english: I will survive even the many trials that pile up.

subtitles.original: I will live to keep on fighting till the dawn
subtitles.english: I will live to keep on fighting till the dawn

subtitles.original: Oi! Oi! Oi! Oi!
subtitles.english: Oi! Oi! Oi! Oi!

subtitles.original: Louder!
subtitles.english: Louder!

subtitles.original: Oi! Oi! Oi! Oi!
subtitles.english: Oi! Oi! Oi! Oi!

subtitles.original: 数えれば先の見えない
subtitles.english: With an invisible future...

subtitles.original: ゼロの境界 迷い込んだとしても
subtitles.english: ...even if I wander into the border of zero...

subtitles.original: 何度も繰り返される 孤独の終焉
subtitles.english: ...the end of loneliness repeated over and over,

subtitles.original: そこに残ったアンサー
subtitles.english: the answer left there.

subtitles.original: Don't break, we will never give up
subtitles.english: Don't break, we will never give up

subtitles.original: Don't break, 羽ばたくそして
subtitles.english: Don't break, and then flap my wings,

subtitles.original: 消せない強さは 時の標
subtitles.english: the unerasable strength is the guidepost of time.

subtitles.original: 灰が舞い上がる大地 身を焦がして
subtitles.english: Burning my body on the land where ashes soar,

subtitles.original: 凍る夜明けの中 目を覚ます
subtitles.english: waking up in the freezing dawn.

subtitles.original: 刃交じり合う切っ先 交わした契りは
subtitles.english: The promise exchanged at the tips of clashing blades...

subtitles.original: Rise and truth, turn to light after pain to the day
subtitles.english: Rise and truth, turn to light after pain to the day

subtitles.original: I've been trying to find my destiny
subtitles.english: I've been trying to find my destiny

subtitles.original: But they keep pushing and pulling me astray
subtitles.english: But they keep pushing and pulling me astray

subtitles.original: If I go run, what awaits me in the dark
subtitles.english: If I go run, what awaits me in the dark

subtitles.original: Could you tell me, please, where I need to go
subtitles.english: Could you tell me, please, where I need to go

subtitles.original: Tell me, I can hear it clearly
subtitles.english: Tell me, I can hear it clearly

subtitles.original: Tell me, 声なき声に
subtitles.english: Tell me, to the voiceless voice,

subtitles.original: みなぎる決意は 影を払う
subtitles.english: the overflowing determination dispels the shadows.

subtitles.original: ほむら降り注ぐ空に 身を焦がして
subtitles.english: Burning my body in the sky where flames pour down,

subtitles.original: 乱れた空が描いた イミテーション
subtitles.english: an imitation drawn by the chaotic sky.

subtitles.original: 数多重なる試練も生き抜いてみせる
subtitles.english: I will survive even the many trials that pile up,

subtitles.original: Blazing flame, 遠く未来照らす
subtitles.english: blazing flame, illuminating the distant future.

subtitles.original: Luminous, and in the next life, I promise I will find you
subtitles.english: Luminous, and in the next life, I promise I will find you
